reviews.comment:
Plena temporada, un solo playero y 6 puntos de expendio de combustible sin funcionar. Una vergüenza suben en un mes 3 veces los precios y no son capaces de tener personal. Estimados en respuesta a lo dicho. Soy técnico electromecánico y dejé el currículum en diferentes oportunidades. La capacitación y ropa va por parte de la empresa. . Solo hago un comentario como socio.

(Translated by Google)
Peak season, only one attendant and six fuel pumps out of service. It's a disgrace that they raise prices three times in a month and can't even afford to hire enough staff. In response to what I've said, I'm an electromechanical technician and I've submitted my resume several times. The company provides training and uniforms. I'm just commenting as a member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NmRMNVJREAE
